config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse of power and suppression of basic freedoms. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and necessary public reason, like safety or preventing harm to others. From my perspective, people are not just parts of a collective; they are human beings with dignity that should not be sacrificed too casually.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya sangat curiga terhadap argumen “demi masyarakat” karena sejarah menunjukkan betapa mudahnya itu dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, sensor, dan penindasan minoritas. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas awal yang kuat, lalu baru dibatasi jika ada alasan publik yang benar-benar jelas, sempit, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, seperti mencegah bahaya langsung kepada orang lain. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan individu paling lemah, tetapi yang mampu melindungi kebebasan sambil tetap menjaga ketertiban umum.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society should not automatically take priority over the individual, because in practice that idea often becomes a blank check for authority to silence criticism and ignore minority rights. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to “the common good” can be used to pressure people to stay quiet, even when they are being treated unfairly. A good society is not built by sacrificing individual dignity first; it is built by protecting rights and only limiting them when there is a clear, necessary, and proportionate public reason.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena hak individu tidak boleh diperlakukan sebagai sesuatu yang sekunder terhadap “kepentingan masyarakat” yang didefinisikan secara longgar. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembungkaman, diskriminasi, dan perluasan kuasa negara, terutama ketika minoritas tidak punya perlindungan yang kuat. Memang ada situasi ketika kepentingan publik harus membatasi kebebasan, tetapi batas itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan menjadi alasan umum untuk mengorbankan orang per orang. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat justru diukur dari seberapa kuat ia melindungi hak individu saat tekanan mayoritas sedang besar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because in Indonesia that kind of argument is too easy to turn into pressure, silence, and abuse of power. The claim of “common good” often sounds noble, but in practice it can be used to push minorities, critics, or ordinary people to accept unfair treatment for the sake of order. I do think public interests matter, especially for safety and social stability, but they should limit rights only in narrow, clear, and proportionate ways, not by default. A healthy society is one that protects individual dignity first, because once that is lost, “society” becomes just a word for whoever has the most power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai prinsip umum, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa sering dalih “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai untuk menekan minoritas dan memperluas kuasa negara. Argumen bahwa masyarakat harus didahulukan terdengar rapi, tetapi terlalu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk sensor, diskriminasi, atau pembatasan yang tidak perlu. Bagi saya, hak individu harus menjadi titik awal yang kuat, dan pembatasan hanya sah kalau benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji untuk mencegah bahaya nyata. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang paling cepat mengorbankan orang demi ketertiban, melainkan yang paling konsisten melindungi martabat tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
